title: Youtube Poop: PUT THIS ON YOUR NEXT DVD
description:
Note: Not meant for humiliation or something of the same interest.

This might be what you call an ad for Jeremy's (bumnumba1's) new Smashed Update Dvd. The link is on the video description of the video I'm responding to. I was thinking of getting one also. I'll just make it a gift "from me, to Jeremy"

Keep up the vids man.
